title: Course Representative (CR)
description: Serve as the liaison between students and faculty/administration, voicing student concerns and helping coordinate academic matters for the cohort.
responsibilities: Communicate student feedback to module leaders and administration
Help coordinate schedules, announcements, and cohort-wide issues
Support smooth communication between students and the university

title: Volunteer
description: Assisted in organizing and managing the Economics Olympiad event, ensuring a smooth experience for participants and attendees.
responsibilities: Helped set up and manage event logistics
Assisted participants with registration and information
Supported the event team in various tasks to ensure a successful Olympiad

title: Coordinator
description: Coordinated and facilitated activities for the Creative Youth Forum, promoting engagement and collaboration among young participants.
responsibilities: Facilitated discussions and workshops for participants
Ensured smooth operation of the forum and addressed issues as they arose
